check_title: S3 Bucket has public access enabled
description: S3 bucket my-public-bucket has public access enabled which may expose sensitive data.
risk: Public S3 buckets can expose sensitive data to the internet.

Recommendation.Text: Disable public access on the S3 bucket via Block Public Access settings.

check_title: Root account does not have hardware MFA enabled
description: The root account does not have a hardware MFA device enabled.
risk: Root account without MFA is a critical security risk.

Recommendation.Text: Enable hardware MFA for the root account.

check_title: Security group allows SSH ingress from 0.0.0.0/0
description: Security group sg-0abc123 allows unrestricted SSH access from the internet.
risk: Unrestricted SSH access exposes instances to brute force attacks.

Recommendation.Text: Restrict SSH access to known IP ranges only.

check_title: EC2 instance does not enforce IMDSv2
description: EC2 instance i-0abc123def456 does not require IMDSv2, leaving it vulnerable to SSRF attacks.
risk: Without IMDSv2, SSRF vulnerabilities can be used to steal instance credentials.

Recommendation.Text: Enforce IMDSv2 on all EC2 instances.

check_title: CloudTrail is not enabled in all regions
description: CloudTrail trail is not configured to log all regions.
risk: Without multi-region CloudTrail, API activity in some regions may go undetected.

check_title: S3 Bucket has public access enabled
description: S3 bucket my-encrypted-bucket has public access correctly blocked.
